query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A solitary tree with a full, rounded canopy stands in an open field of golden-brown and green grass, positioned toward the right side of the frame on a gentle slope. Dense mist envelops the landscape, fading the distant background into a pale, uniform gray and obscuring the horizon and surrounding terrain. The foreground shows tall grasses stretching across the lower portion of the image, while the tree emerges as a soft dark form against the hazy atmosphere.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A solitary tree with a rounded canopy stands in an open field of golden-brown grass, positioned toward the right on a gentle slope. Dense atmospheric haze erases fine detail and renders surfaces ambiguous, dissolving the background into an indistinct pale void. The color palette is heavily muted and faded, consisting of desaturated yellows and dull grays with very low vibrancy. Flat, diffuse lighting eliminates shadows and collapses dimensional depth, while weak separation between light and dark produces a low-contrast, oppressive atmosphere that conveys a melancholic, isolated mood.
